title: No More Hunger
description: Changes the hunger system with stamina, slow health regeneration and more to make food unnecessary, but still useful
body:
# What does this data pack do?

- Hunger is changed to a stamina system, where you can run/swim for around 20 seconds, with a similar recovery
- When not a maximum health, you regenerate 1 health every 15 seconds
- You can regenerate even faster with food (it also gives back stamina), but it's not necessary to survive
- Stamina is shown as bubbles where food originally was, and can also appear in your actionbar. You can add the one in the actionbar by typing `/function stamina_show`, and `/function stamina_hide` takes it away
- Eating enchanted golden apples lets your stamina decrease slower, with 5 gapples letting you run/swim forever!

## How much health each food gives

### 1 health
Beetroot, cookie, dried_kelp, glow berries, melon slice, poisonous potato, potato, raw chicken, raw cod, raw mutton, raw salmon, sweet berries and tropical fish

### 3 health
Apple, carrot, chorus fruit, honey bottle, raw beef, raw porkchop, raw rabbit, rotten flesh and spider eye

### 6 health
Baked potato, beetroot soup, bread, cooked chicken, cooked cod, cooked rabbit, enchanted golden apple and golden apple (both still give regeneration), mushroom stew, pumpkin pie and suspicious stew

### 8 health
Cooked mutton and cooked salmon

### 10 health
Cooked beef, cooked porkchop and golden carrot

### 11 health
Rabbit stew
